ORMAX SCALING OPTION
Sorcery
3

These are the best every game.

1
Your Clone Keeps the BuffDomination

Shaco deals extra damage when striking enemies from the back. Hail of Blades pairs perfectly with his passive, to stealth in and try to burst with 3 super quick autos before they react and turn around.

  • The omega OP tech for Hail of Blades is to come out of stealth with a Q auto, activating Hail of Blades. Then press R. Your clone will keep Hail of Blades' attack speed buff for the entire duration it's out. If players ignore the clone, it will solo them with this buff.
2
100% Uptime From EInspiration

Shaco has a permanent slow on his E, which means he can have 100% up-time from Approach Velocity.

  • Your clone can trigger it too. So even if you're not in range, if your clone is hitting them, it helps you catch up with the extra move-speed.
3
Max Scaling OptionSorcery

Can swap to Gathering Storm and Absolute Focus as your secondary runes if you want to play for max scaling.

  • Much better in lower elo brackets where games go longer, and the early game is a bit less important.

How to Clear

LEVEL
1

Here's what you need to know to clear as Shaco:

  • Level 1: Run IMMEDIATELY to Raptors and place a box down ASAP at 0:25, then another at 0:40. You will start at Red
  • As you do Red, the boxes will get the Big Raptor down to around 600 HP, and it will walk towards you. it to get level 2.
  • Then throughout your clears, you can leave camps at 20-30% ~ HP left with a Box to finish them off.
  • This is why we're putting 2 points in W, so we can speed up our clear leaving camps early with boxes.

★

Core Build

Core Build
Core Build

Many players believe that Shaco is an early game champion that falls off, but that's not really true these days. And where most new Shaco go wrong is that they try to force ganks all the time, rather than playing consistently.

Shaco is all about playing on your spikes. Look for ganks early, but keep up your farm, at least until you complete This gives your Q much more burst, making your ganks more consistent. Then rush before completing boots.

  • This makes you into a ganking machine. 's lethality buff also applies to the first hit, which buffs your Q's backstab damage to a TON. You shred player's as long as you make sure to get the backstab damage.

You usually want to default to because they not only buff you, but also your clone. You can solo objectives pretty fast by summoning your clone to tank and backstabbing Dragon with the extra attack speed. Don't always try to force this, just keep in mind it's a good option. And always buy other boots, if they're a better option.

  • can replace in games where they're EXTREMELY tanky and have a lot of HP and Armor. It also opens you up for going crit in the right circumstances
★

Crit Tank Buster

Crit Tank Buster

This build is extremely greedy, but very strong at helping you deal with tankier team compositions. You might be wondering why you're only building 50% crit? Shaco's Q is a guaranteed crit. So your first auto will always benefit from extra damage to deal A LOT of up-front burst.

  • So this build is good into squishies with the guaranteed Q crit, but the 50% is also overall good DPS to help you take down tankier targets

Usually the only big weakness is that is sometimes awkward to buy. After if you base with 1300 gold and can buy then you can go crit. Otherwise, you're probably better off continuing to buy lethality items.

  • You CAN replace with late, late game. And then with for 100% crit. But that's rarely going to happen
